---
title: "Frances Eliza Macmillan"
---

## Frances Eliza Macmillan

**Dates:** (1821-1867)

**Maiden name:** (Orridge)

### Description

sister-in-law and partner of Alexander Macmillan

### Biography

She married (1850) Daniel Macmillan (1813-1857) [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from May 30th [1870] 
- Letter from Feb. 18. 1867
- Letter from  Sept 6 1866
- Letter from Sept 3d 1866
- Letter from  June 14 1866
- Letter from Decr 8th 1865
- Letter from Aug 1. 1865
- Letter from June 15. 1865
- Letter from June 2. 1865
- Letter from March 30. 1865
- Letter from March 6 1865
- Letter from Novr 21st 1864
- Letter from August 22nd [1864]
- Letter from July 12th [1864]
- Letter from June 3d 1864
- Letter from June 2nd 1864
- Letter from May 13 1864
- Letter from Febry 26th 1864
- Letter from Feb 25:1864
- Letter from Jany 25th 1864

*... and 2 more letters*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
